beacons.message: Im just wanting some space.  Give me your space!!
beacons.title: Myster Signal 001 Listener 001
beacons.trigger_popup_message: You have crossed into unknown space.  Keep away or Ill use my ray gun
beacons.triggered_message: New event discovered: New Story Event.

beacons.message: Vayrax territory marker has registered your wake signature.
beacons.title: Wake Signature Echo
beacons.triggered_message: Vayrax territory marker has registered your wake signature.

beacons.title: Wreckage Listener Event Test 001 Listener 001
beacons.triggered_message: New event discovered: Wreckage Listener Event Test 001.

beacons.message: Human habitat signal detected. Docking handshake unstable but readable.
beacons.title: Human Station Habitat

beacons.message: Melissa's personal beacon is active off the habitat approach line.
beacons.title: Melissa Active Beacon

beacons.message: Disabled in single-chain opening event; Melissa contact is handled inside opening_wake_sequence_001 inside Tier 1 space.
beacons.title: Melissa Contact Listener Disabled

beacons.message: Chapter 002 has started at the Human Station Habitat.
beacons.title: Human Habitat Chapter 002 Listener
beacons.triggered_message: Chapter 002 has started at the Human Station Habitat.

dialogue_lines: Had me sick as chief's space chow!
We will have this conversation later.
giver.message: Had me sick as chief's space chow!

dialogue_lines: That old beacon is outside normal safe range.
I need someone with enough nerve to pull its data.
Bring the data back and I will make it worth your time.
npcs.event_accept_message: Good. I am sending the beacon coordinates to your event console.
npcs.event_completed_message: That data chip is exactly what I needed.
npcs.event_decline_message: Understood. The signal is not going anywhere.
npcs.event_idle_message: The beacon is still waiting. Use your event console autopilot.
npcs.greeting_message: You picked up my signal. Good. I have a job if your ship can handle a little distance.
npcs.message: You picked up my signal. Good. I have a job if your ship can handle a little distance.
npcs.name: Guild Contact
npcs.offer_text: A guild beacon is still broadcasting beyond normal local range. Reach it, download the data, and return.

shared_meta.event_accept_message: Good. I am sending the beacon coordinates to your event console.
shared_meta.event_completed_message: That data chip is exactly what I needed.
shared_meta.event_decline_message: Understood. The signal is not going anywhere.
shared_meta.event_idle_message: The beacon is still waiting. Use your event console autopilot.

npcs.success_text: That is the signal data. Good work.

npcs.greeting_message: Lets get you fixed up. When your ready to fight. Click event.
npcs.message: Lets get you fixed up. When your ready to fight. Click event.
npcs.name: Roino
npcs.offer_text: Trade iron x100 to restore your hull to full integrity.
